# Maestro Beta Release

This release contains the current Maestro beta companion app for live MuseScore editing and the manual source-install path.

## Important Notes

- The macOS app in this release is unsigned and not notarized.
- On first launch, right-click `Maestro.app` and choose `Open`.
- If macOS blocks the app again, use `System Settings > Privacy & Security > Open Anyway`.
- Maestro beta is a macOS desktop companion for live MuseScore editing, not a standalone notation editor.
- The macOS app now remembers non-secret provider settings locally, stores an OpenAI API key in Keychain when used, and offers a `Diag` action for local beta diagnostics.
- Maestro is experimental and AI-generated output may be incorrect, unsafe, incomplete, or unreliable.

See the repository [README](https://github.com/TidalTunes/Maestro/blob/main/README.md), [LICENSE](https://github.com/TidalTunes/Maestro/blob/main/LICENSE), and [DISCLAIMER](https://github.com/TidalTunes/Maestro/blob/main/DISCLAIMER.md) for details.
